title: Just Expressions
description: A EMF resource pack that brings Fresh Animations eye Animations but for the player. Just that...
body:
**You need the LATEST versions [Entity Model Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features) (+v2.0.2), [Entity Texture Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric) (+v6.0.1) to use this pack. This are client-side mods that are available for both Forge and Fabric**
 
![EMF logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa32bdb40851a6882ecba3cb37e95a6ecc4d85c.png)![ETF logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d4608f18fc00ca5e9da67f3213c436a24b0d5d8.png)

**OPTIFINE DOESN'T SUPPORT PLAYER CUSTOM MODELS ...yet, just in case**
**A part from the [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) resource pack... but just the expressions**
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check this tutorial and the new face feaures added in v1.1 in this video made by Laynce.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uDccyv7FROs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[To fix Black eyes follow this quick guide](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Fix-Black-Eyes) ↓. For a video demonstration go to this page in the wiki of the resourcepack.

[Fix Black Eyes · IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves Wiki (github.com)](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Fix-Black-Eyes)

If you want your hand to stop moving in the first person perspective. [Go to this page in the wiki to disable it.](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Fix-Moving-1st-Person-Hand)

[Fix Moving 1st Person Hand · IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves Wiki (github.com)](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Fix-Moving-1st-Person-Hand)

For this mod to work you have to activate this features in the EMF and ETF settings:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

First go to resourcepacks

![tuto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b45812cf8a3e1350baa3b118b8d06988843c8c5.png)

The click in this button (ETF and EMF settings)

![tuto 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f489cf91567d21c2997f0114e1fd491f68d8a270.png)

Click in textures

![tuto 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df72e0c73ea8bb8344ca2676b1112d4ec9d9d1a2.png)

Click on player skin settings

![tuto 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b9038a88c9662bf00fdc199a867d8930a0cc67.png)

And activate the option that says "Allow skin transparency" and set it to "All skins"

![tuto 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/263b5f998339f30be5273a234ea8b217a1f6a86e.png)

Go back to the mod settings and click on models

![tuto 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68743cd4890de61b252587f8962ca2a5be64e0fb.png)

Go to Options and Fixes

![tuto 7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17f162b6864eb693de39ad7f060e4369d88abe88.png)

And finally set to On the option that says "Prevent first person hand animation"

![tuto 8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2280c0011e6126814ba217ea2842f3dfbf3c51b.png)

</details>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To animate the eyes go to the [Fresh Moves wiki](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki/Eyebrows). TLDR you must add extra pixels to your skin and upload that modified skin. [ The positions of those extra pixels are in the wiki](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki). All supported eyes are there.
Here are some examples in real skins.

![wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/349e93f1b96fb3dc38de5cd21a45b0491a8ff1bd.png)

Here are some examples of things you must get in the end in your skin.png. This result must be used as your skin. If other people have these extra pixels on their skin, you will be able to see their animated eyes in multiplayer.

![type 9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ac6e2cebb2da808506ab611a925b277ad1ba429.png)
![type 10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/396e0b595c3be699a602f42ebfed709a6e2aa254.png)
![type 21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84677d4d0acfd8a1ebce4f6cff04892c2f35821.png)

May look like there is some part missing the eyewhites but in game the eyewhites expand to their normal size. Notice that it has the eyebrows at the third position.

The version of this pack with animated eyes (Expressive Fresh Moves.zip) will also have the extra pixels on the default Minecraft skins (Steve, Alex, Makena, Efe, Noor, Kai, Ari, Sunny, and Zuri) as an example. ****
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Credits:**

FreshLX: Creator of Fresh Animations. The pillager animations of the Fresh Animations pack were used as the base of this pack.

Traben: Creator of ETF and ETM and the custom player models feature.

BoZo-Xo2 & CoolRanchChris: Creators of the original Fresh Player and members of the Traben's discord server (The pack where Fresh Moves is made from)

Fresh Player and other Player Animation packs can be found in the [Traben's discord server](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) in the etf-emf-pack-list channel. Be sure to take a look.
